heroEyebrow: Celestial Church of Christ · Bloomington, CA
heroSubcopy: A parish of the Celestial Church of Christ, keeping vigil in Bloomington since 1999. Come as you are.
missionQuote: The church exists to win and nurture souls for the kingdom of God — to carry the cross of Jesus, lift it high, and make Him known.

sundayRhythm.heading: Arrive
sundayRhythm.body: Doors open at half past nine. You don't need to wear a sutana — come as you are, find a seat anywhere, and let the choir set the tone.

sundayRhythm.heading: Worship
sundayRhythm.body: Songs in Yoruba and English, scripture readings, prayer, the message. Communion the first Sunday of every month.

sundayRhythm.heading: Fellowship
sundayRhythm.body: After service we gather for food and conversation. If you're new, stay for it — it's how the parish makes room for you.

children.text: Whether you've worshipped with us for years or are visiting for the first time, this is your house. Our parish keeps the rhythm — Sunday worship, the Thursday vigil, the choir's hymns in Yoruba and English — and it's here for you to step into at any time.
If you carry a question, a grief, or a thanksgiving, bring it. The doors are open.
